notes: Exclude rationale pre-staged: architectural scope mismatch — airlineops ledger_schema.py (501L, 4 audit entry types, per-ADR obpi-audit.jsonl) vs gzkit events.py + ledger.py + schemas/ledger.json (1288L, 17+ lifecycle event types, central .gzkit/ledger.jsonl). gzkit already enforces OBPI/ADR ID patterns via Pydantic Field(pattern=...) in core/models.py:37,140 and has richer nested evidence models (ObpiReceiptEvidence, ScopeAudit, GitSyncState, ReqProofInput). No narrow absorption warranted. Final decision subject to brief authoring in Stage 2.
